Ntc Of Motion Opposing Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MANUEL RIVAS, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF MANUEL RIVAS, JR., 415.439.8874, FOR PLAINTIFF FATIMA TICAS AND ERIC RODRIGUEZ.
NAIRI PATERSON, ESQ., STRATMAN PATTERSON & HUNTER, 510.457.3472, FOR DEFENDANTS ABIGAIL AND ANDREW YU.
CYNTHIA SOLIMAN, ESQ., ERICSON ARBUTHNOT, 415.362.7126, FOR DEFENDANTS GUADALUPE RODRIGUEZ & KIMBERLY STRUB.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: DEFENDANTS GUADALUPE RODRIGUEZ, KIMBERLY STRUB'S Motion Opposing Defendants Abigail & Andrew Yu's Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement. Good faith determination is denied without prejudice. The settlors have not satisfied their burden of providing substantial evidence to support a finding that the settlement is in good faith. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
